unit.t2-archer.name: Archer
unit.t3-frere-lame.name: Blade Brother
unit.t4-griffon.name: Griffin

unit.t6-chevalier-griffon.name: Griffin Knight
unit.t7-ange.name: Angel
unit.t1-conscrit-elite.name: Halberdier
unit.t2-archer-elite.name: Marksman
unit.t3-frere-lame-elite.name: Templar
unit.t4-griffon-elite.name: Royal Griffin
unit.t5-pretresse-elite.name: High Priestess
unit.t6-chevalier-griffon-elite.name: Griffin Champion
unit.t7-ange-elite.name: Archangel
hero.haven-aldric.name: Aldric
hero.haven-aldric.bio: A Griffon Knight who swore to hold the march while a single child sleeps behind his walls. His banner has never once fallen back.
hero.haven-seraphine.name: Séraphine
hero.haven-seraphine.bio: A Cleric of the Light who mends at the front what war undoes. They say her prayer keeps the dark a sword's length away.
unit.t1-conscrit.lore: Yesterday he ploughed fields. The priestess blessed his brow, then looked away: she already knew. We guard the people — sometimes by sending one to die for them.
unit.t1-conscrit-elite.lore: They taught him the line does not fall back. Not why; the halberd is answer enough. Behind him a village sleeps, never learning his name.
unit.t2-archer.lore: She aims for the throat, as taught, and whispers a prayer between shots. Twelve arrows, twelve sins a priest will forgive her come nightfall.
unit.t2-archer-elite.lore: He never misses now. That is his torment: every death bears his name. The Empire calls it a gift. He calls it a debt he will answer for.
unit.t3-frere-lame.lore: He swore silence, poverty, and the blade. Two vows comfort him. The third wakes him at night — yet it has held the frontier since the First Eclipse.
unit.t3-frere-lame-elite.lore: The Templar no longer doubts: doubt was prayed out of him, year by year. What remains strikes true. None can say if a man still lives beneath.
unit.t4-griffon.lore: The Empire's emblem, and it knows nothing of that. It knows only wind, hunger, and the hand that fed it young. For that hand, it dives onto spears.
unit.t4-griffon-elite.lore: Hatched in the palace eyries, marked in gold. They call it royal; it believes itself free. Both hold true so long as it falls upon the Empire's foe.
unit.t5-pretresse.lore: She heals with one hand, smites with the other, and blesses the dying she could not save. Faith demands everything; she stopped counting what she has left.
unit.t5-pretresse-elite.lore: She has buried more sons than any mother. Her light never wavers — that is the price. They revere her; none dare ask if she still sleeps at night.
unit.t6-chevalier-griffon.lore: One man, one beast, a single oath. The knight dies if he falls; the griffin dies if it stays. Neither of them thinks to flee.
unit.t6-chevalier-griffon-elite.lore: The Champion has outlived three mounts. He no longer grieves the fourth before battle: he will grieve after, if the Empire still stands.
unit.t7-ange.lore: It descends only when the prayer grows desperate enough. Beautiful, terrible, and deaf to our reasons. We beg its aid, and dread the answer.
unit.t7-ange-elite.lore: The Archangel remembers the First Eclipse; we are but a day in its memory. It guards the place, the law, the people — and never says which comes first.
